# Read the files
import json, sys, re, unicodedata
from pathlib import Path

quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

len(quran), type(quran), len(hadiths), type(hadiths)[:1] if isinstance(hadiths,list) else 'not list'

response_context = """نعم، الإسلام دين عالمي يرحب بجميع البشر بغض النظر عن عرقهم أو ثقافتهم. يؤكد القرآن الكريم على وحدة البشرية ومساواة جميع الناس أمام الله. يقول الله تعالى في سورة الحجرات: "يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُم مِّن ذَكَرٍ وَأُنثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوبًا وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ" (الحجرات: 13).
كما أكد النبي محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم على هذه المساواة في العديد من الأحاديث الشريفة. قال صلى الله عليه وسلم: "لا فضل لعربي على أعجمي ولا لأعجمي على عربي ولا لأبيض على أسود ولا لأسود على أبيض إلا بالتقوى" (رواه ابن حبان).
لذلك، يمكن القول أن الإسلام دين متعدد الثقافات والعرقيات، حيث يرحب بجميع البشر ويؤكد على وحدة الإنسانية ومساواة جميع الناس أمام الله."""
start, end = 488, 580
full_substring = response_context[start:end]
full_substring, len(response_context), start, end

# Build normalization
import re

arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             [\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED] 
                             """, re.VERBOSE)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s or ''
    # Remove tashkeel/diacritics
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640', '')
    # Normalize Alef variants to bare alef
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # Alef maqsura to ya
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # Hamza variants: map ؤ->و, ئ->ي, ّ maybe removed already
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # Remove diacritic-like characters leftover
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)  # keep Arabic letters and digits and underscore
    # Replace english/latin letters and digits? remove them
    # Collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    # Lowercase: not necessary for Arabic
    return s

full_sub = full_substring
snippet = "لا فضل لعر...لا بالتقوى"
normalized_full = normalize_arabic(full_sub)
normalized_snippet = normalize_arabic(snippet)
normalized_full, normalized_snippet

# Inspect first few hadith entries keys
for i in range(10):
    print(i, type(hadiths[i]), list(hadiths[i].keys())[:50])
    print({k: hadiths[i].get(k) for k in list(hadiths[i].keys())[:8]})
    print('---')

# Search hadiths for matches
from collections import Counter
def tokenize(s):
    return s.split()

normalized_full = normalize_arabic(full_sub)
tokens_full = tokenize(normalized_full)

matches = []
for idx, h in enumerate(hadiths):
    # pick Matn if available and non-empty, else hadithTxt
    candidate_raw = None
    if h.get('Matn'):
        candidate_raw = h.get('Matn')
    elif h.get('hadithTxt'):
        candidate_raw = h.get('hadithTxt')
    elif h.get('hadithText'):
        candidate_raw = h.get('hadithText')
    # else skip
    if not candidate_raw:
        continue
    cand_norm = normalize_arabic(candidate_raw)
    # compute token overlap F1
    tokens_cand = tokenize(cand_norm)
    # Compute overlap count (multiset)
    c_full = Counter(tokens_full)
    c_cand = Counter(tokens_cand)
    overlap = sum((c_full & c_cand).values())
    if len(tokens_cand)==0 or len(tokens_full)==0:
        continue
    precision = overlap / len(tokens_cand)
    recall = overlap / len(tokens_full)
    if precision + recall == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    # Also check if normalized_full in cand_norm
    substr_in = normalized_full in cand_norm
    # record candidates with f1 > 0.2 to inspect
    if f1 >= 0.5 or substr_in:
        matches.append((idx, f1, substr_in, candidate_raw, cand_norm, h.get('hadithID'), h.get('title')))

# Sort matches by f1 descending
matches_sorted = sorted(matches, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
len(matches_sorted), matches_sorted[:20]

query_tokens = tokenize(normalize_arabic("لا فضل التقوى"))
hits = []
for idx,h in enumerate(hadiths):
    candidate = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('hadithText')
    if not candidate:
        continue
    cn = normalize_arabic(candidate)
    tokens = tokenize(cn)
    if all(q in tokens for q in query_tokens):
        hits.append((idx, candidate, cn[:400], h.get('hadithID'), h.get('title')))
len(hits), hits[:20]

query = normalize_arabic("العرب العجم")
res = []
for idx,h in enumerate(hadiths):
    candidate = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('hadithText')
    if not candidate: continue
    cn = normalize_arabic(candidate)
    if 'العرب' in cn and 'العجم' in cn:
        res.append((idx, candidate, cn[:200], h.get('hadithID'), h.get('title')))
len(res)

for r in res:
    idx, cand, cn, hid, title = r
    print("idx", idx, "hadithID", hid, "title:", title)
    print("Raw:", cand[:400])
    print("Norm:", cn)
    print("------")

query1 = normalize_arabic("عربي")
query2 = normalize_arabic("اعجمي")
res = []
for idx,h in enumerate(hadiths):
    candidate = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('hadithText')
    if not candidate: continue
    cn = normalize_arabic(candidate)
    tokens = tokenize(cn)
    if query1 in tokens and query2 in tokens:
        res.append((idx, candidate, cn[:400], h.get('hadithID'), h.get('title')))
len(res), res[:10]

# Compute token F1 similarity across DB and get top matches
import math
top_matches = []
for idx,h in enumerate(hadiths):
    candidate = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('hadithText')
    if not candidate:
        continue
    cn = normalize_arabic(candidate)
    tokens_cand = tokenize(cn)
    c_full = Counter(tokens_full)
    c_cand = Counter(tokens_cand)
    overlap = sum((c_full & c_cand).values())
    if len(tokens_cand)==0:
        continue
    precision = overlap / len(tokens_cand)
    recall = overlap / len(tokens_full) if len(tokens_full)>0 else 0
    if precision+recall ==0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    top_matches.append((f1, idx, h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt'), normalize_arabic(h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt'))[:300], h.get('hadithID'), h.get('title')))
# take top 20
top_matches_sorted = sorted(top_matches, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:20]
top_matches_sorted

# Search Quranic verses
q_matches = []
for i, item in enumerate(quran):
    ayah = item.get('ayah_text') or item.get('text') or ''
    if not ayah: continue
    cn = normalize_arabic(ayah)
    if normalized_full in cn or normalize_arabic("لا فضل") in cn:
        q_matches.append((i, item.get('ayah_text'), cn, item.get('chapter'), item.get('verse_number') if 'verse_number' in item else None))
len(q_matches), q_matches[:10]

import difflib, math, sys
best = []
for idx,h in enumerate(hadiths):
    candidate = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('hadithText')
    if not candidate: continue
    cn = normalize_arabic(candidate)
    # use difflib SequenceMatcher ratio
    ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, normalized_full, cn).ratio()
    best.append((ratio, idx, h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt'), cn[:200], h.get('hadithID'), h.get('title')))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:20]
best_sorted
